## Model Links (for Local Users)

**diffusion_models**

- [flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9b-fp8/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors)

**vae**

- [full_encoder_small_decoder.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-small-decoder/resolve/main/full_encoder_small_decoder.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   └── flux-2-klein-9b-fp8.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   └── qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│       └── full_encoder_small_decoder.safetensors
```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud updates follow stable releases, so some nightly-supported models may not be available yet.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: change the dress of image 1 character to that of image 2

📌 ComfyUI Workflow Notes

Author: Sharvin Suntoobacus

YouTube Channel: CodeCraftersCorner

Patreon: [Support on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/codecrafterscorner)

---

### ℹ️ About This Workflow

This workflow allows users to transfer specific clothing items or garments from one image to a target character. By utilizing Flux.2 Klein and automated masking, users can swap outfits, change patterns, or showcase products on human models while maintaining high visual fidelity and texture detail.

### 🎥 Tutorial / Guide

[Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/78M0i9v1YOc)

### 📥 Model Links (for Local Users)

**diffusion_models**

* [Flux.2 Klein 9B GGUF](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/FLUX.2-klein-9B-GGUF/tree/main) (Recommended for low VRAM)

**text_encoders**

* t5xxl_fp16.safetensors or clip_l.safetensors

**vae**

* ae.safetensors (Flux VAE)

---

### 📂 Model Storage Location

Place the downloaded files into the following directories within your ComfyUI installation:

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 unet/
│   │   └── FLUX.2-klein-9B-GGUF.gguf
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   └── t5xxl_fp16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│       └── ae.safetensors
```

---

### 💡 Notes
* **GGUF Support:** To use the GGUF version, you must install the **ComfyUI-GGUF** custom node by City96 via the ComfyUI Manager.
* **Input Images:** Image 1 (Bottom) is the target character; Image 2 (Top) is the source garment.
* **Masking:** Ensure the prompt in the masking section accurately describes the item (e.g., "dress", "shirt", "shoes") to ensure SAM 3 provides a clean cutout.
* **Variations:** Set the noise seed to "randomize" if you need to generate different fits or hairstyles for the same input.

**Credit:** Please credit Sharvin Suntoobacus and share YouTube Channel Code Crafters Corner when sharing this workflow.
**Support:** Your support on Patreon helps me continue creating these guides!

[YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@CodeCraftersCorner) | [Patreon Page](https://www.patreon.com/codecrafterscorner)

🙏 **Thank you for your support!**
Apply the the texture of image 2 as a texture to the image 1.
